2603.21100.title: Learning Progressive Adaptation for Multi-Modal Tracking
2603.21100.paper_summary: Due to the limited availability of paired multi-modal data, multi-modal trackers are typically built by adopting pre-trained RGB models with parameter-efficient fine-tuning modules. However, these fine-tuning methods overlook advanced adaptations for applying RGB pre-trained models and fail to modulate a single specific modality, cross-modal interactions, and the prediction head. To address the issues, we propose to perform Progressive Adaptation for Multi-Modal Tracking (PATrack). This innovative approach incorporates modality-dependent, modality-entangled, and task-level adapters, effectively bridging the gap in adapting RGB pre-trained networks to multi-modal data through a progressive strategy. Specifically, modality-specific information is enhanced through the modality-dependent adapter, decomposing the high- and low-frequency components, which ensures a more robust feature representation within each modality. The inter-modal interactions are introduced in the modality-entangled adapter, which implements a cross-attention operation guided by inter-modal shared information, ensuring the reliability of features conveyed between modalities. Additionally, recognising that the strong inductive bias of the prediction head does not adapt to the fused information, a task-level adapter specific to the prediction head is introduced. In summary, our design integrates intra-modal, inter-modal, and task-level adapters into a unified framework. Extensive experiments on RGB+Thermal, RGB+Depth, and RGB+Event tracking tasks demonstrate that our method shows impressive performance against state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/ouha1998/Learning-Progressive-Adaptation-for-Multi-Modal-Tracking.
2603.21100.paper_summary_zh: 由於配對的多模態數據有限，多模態追蹤器通常是通過採用預訓練的RGB模型和參數高效的微調模塊來構建的。<lb/>然而，這些微調方法忽略了應用RGB預訓練模型的先進適應，並未能調節單一特定模態、跨模態交互和預測頭。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了進行多模態追蹤的漸進適應（PATrack）。<lb/>這一創新方法結合了模態依賴、模態交織和任務級適配器，有效地通過漸進策略彌合了將RGB預訓練網絡適應於多模態數據的差距。<lb/>具體而言，通過模態依賴適配器增強模態特定信息，分解高頻和低頻成分，這確保了每個模態內更穩健的特徵表示。<lb/>在模態交織適配器中引入了模態間的交互，該適配器實施了由模態間共享信息引導的跨注意力操作，確保了模態之間傳遞特徵的可靠性。<lb/>此外，鑑於預測頭的強誘導偏差無法適應融合的信息，我們引入了一個特定於預測頭的任務級適配器。<lb/>總之，我們的設計將模態內、模態間和任務級適配器整合到一個統一的框架中。<lb/>在RGB+熱成像、RGB+深度和RGB+事件追蹤任務上的廣泛實驗表明，我們的方法在與最先進的方法相比時展現了令人印象深刻的性能。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/ouha1998/Learning-Progressive-Adaptation-for-Multi-Modal-Tracking 獲得。
2603.21100.author: He Wang et.al.
2603.21100.authors: He Wang, Tianyang Xu, Zhangyong Tang, Xiao-Jun Wu, Josef Kittler
